laws.title: Consistent Button Styles
laws.description: Ensure all button styles across various interfaces are consistent to maintain uniformity and recognizability.
laws.remediation: Standardize button styles in the style guide and enforce them through component libraries.

laws.title: Color Contrast
laws.description: Improve contrast between text and background colors to enhance readability.
laws.remediation: Adjust color palette to meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA contrast ratios.

laws.title: Responsive Grid Layout
laws.description: Ensure the grid system adapts seamlessly across various devices for optimal viewing experience.
laws.remediation: Implement CSS media queries to adjust the grid system responsively.

laws.title: Iconography
laws.description: Icons need to be intuitive and clearly indicative of their functionality.
laws.remediation: Use a consistent icon library and conduct usability testing to ensure clarity.

laws.title: Typography Hierarchy
laws.description: Apply a logical hierarchy in typography to guide user attention effectively.
laws.remediation: Define a clear typography scale and apply styles consistently across the site.
